授業目的: This course will teach students how to write academic research essays. Students will learn how to write a thesis statement and how to develop paragraphs that support the thesis. Students will also learn how to do research for supporting material for their paragraphs and incorporate their own ideas related to the research students do. This course will also teach students how to cite their outside sources and write a reference page matching the citations in the essay.
到達目標: This course will teach students how to write academic research essays. Students will learn how to write a thesis statement and how to develop paragraphs that support the thesis. Students will also learn how to do research for supporting material for their paragraphs and incorporate their own ideas related to the research students do. This course will also teach students how to cite their outside sources and write a reference page matching the citations in the essay.
授業方法: Lecture / Writing Exercises / Teacher feedback/Comments on student's writing

教科書/Required texts0: None. All materials will be provided by the teacher.
成績評価Grading0: 評価基準等　Grading Criteria etc.
成績評価Grading1: 定期試験に代わるリポート／Term paper to replace the final examination (02)
成績評価Grading2: Introduction 10%	Research	10%	    Body 30%     Conclusion  10%     Reference List  10%
備考Note0:
Teacher's email: jbgoodteacher@gmail.com
Students will need to use a USB Memory stick, or LUNA to back up their work and to store class materials and save their essay work.
Students MUST have an active e-mail account with either their Kwansei Gakuin e-mail account, gmail, or hotmail.
Students CANNOT pass the class if they are absent more than four times.
